problems.problem: Intimidating UI for first-time investors, leading to high Gen-Z churn rate
evidence: 12% Gen-Z churn rate due to intimidating 'Pro' UI
Competitive pressure from Groww and Angel One
User-friendly design and easy to operate
positive_points: Strong growth in female user segment (+35% YoY)

problems.problem: Technical issues with e-KYC flow via Digilocker, resulting in high failure rate
evidence: 15% failure rate in e-KYC flow via Digilocker
Implement OCR-based KYC fallback to solve Digilocker issues
negative_points: 15% failure rate in e-KYC flow via Digilocker

problems.problem: Poor discovery and long journey for MTF, leading to user frustration
Lag in MF SIP dashboard tracking, causing concern over user trust
evidence: 48-hour lag in MF SIP dashboard tracking
Migrate SIP database for real-time synchronization
positive_points: Clear identification of core product moats
negative_points: 48-hour lag in MF SIP dashboard tracking
Concerns regarding loss of user trust due to dashboard lag
